Off Calendar Jan-24-2002 Vacated

To Take Case Out Of Judicial Arbitration
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff and defendants. Plaintiff's Motion to Remove case from Arbitration is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel, court ordered motion granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. Trial Date of 9/30/2002 at 9:30 AM, in department 206, is ordered set. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and to give notice of the Mandatory Settlement Conference. Case to be referred to The Early Settlement Program. Defendant's request under CCP 473 (b), is ordered taken under submission. Plaintiff's counsel to file opening brief on or before 1/31/2002 , defendant's counsel to file responding brief on or before 2/7/2002 . Counsel to submit proposed order to the court for the request for fees and costs under CCP 473 (b). Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda. (212)

To Compel Further Interrogatory Answers And Document Production; Mp&As And Decl. In Support
